surf.name: Beginner Surf Lesson
surf.description: Never surfed before? Our patient, certified instructors will have you riding your first wave by the end of the session. All equipment included. Group and private options available.
surf.meetingPoint: Barefoot Break Shop, Avenida Tercer Mundo, San Pancho

surf.name: Intermediate Surf Clinic
surf.description: Already standing up? Level up your technique. Work on timing, positioning, and reading the San Pancho break — one of the fastest and most rewarding waves on the Riviera Nayarit.
surf.meetingPoint: Barefoot Break Shop, Avenida Tercer Mundo, San Pancho

surf.name: Board Rental
surf.description: Choose from our curated quiver of shortboards, longboards, and SUPs. All boards are well-maintained and matched to the daily conditions.
surf.meetingPoint: Barefoot Break Shop, Avenida Tercer Mundo, San Pancho

sea.name: Humpback Whale Watching
sea.description: Witness the magnificent humpback whales that migrate through Banderas Bay from December through March. Our experienced captains know exactly where to find them. An unforgettable morning on the water.

sea.name: Marietas Islands Snorkeling
sea.description: Explore the famous Islas Marietas — a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve. Snorkel crystal-clear waters teeming with tropical fish, rays, and sea turtles. Visit the legendary Hidden Beach (Playa del Amor) inside a volcanic crater. Life jackets mandatory; 10-minute swim into the beach.

sea.name: Sport Fishing
sea.description: San Pancho's waters are rich with Mahi-Mahi, Tuna, Wahoo, and more. Head out at dawn on a traditional panga with our local fishermen who know these waters like family. Beginner-friendly.

sea.name: Sea Turtle Release Experience
sea.description: One of the most magical experiences on the Pacific coast. Visit the local turtle sanctuary where Olive Ridley sea turtles are protected and hatched. Help release baby turtles into the ocean as the sun sets over the Pacific. A profound moment you'll never forget. Seasonal, weather-dependent.

land.name: Jungle Mountain Bike Tour
land.description: Ride through the lush Sierra Madre trails behind San Pancho. Navigate jungle single-track, pass giant Parota trees, and discover hidden viewpoints with panoramic ocean views. Suitable for intermediate riders.
land.meetingPoint: Barefoot Break Shop, Avenida Tercer Mundo, San Pancho

land.name: Sierra Madre Jungle Hike
land.description: Walk into the wild. Trek through tropical forest, spot exotic birds, and learn about the local ecosystem from our nature-savvy guides. Ends with a refreshing dip in a natural freshwater pool.
land.meetingPoint: Barefoot Break Shop, Avenida Tercer Mundo, San Pancho
